hero.sub: BikeMeNow is the complete dealership platform — BankID verification, sales pipeline, purchase agreements, payments and analytics. Built exclusively for Swedish motorcycle retailers.
hero.cta2: Already have an account? Log in
hero.disclaimer: No credit card required · Cancel any time · Swedish data centre

integrations.label: Works with the tools you already use

features.title: One platform. Zero compromises.
features.sub: Built specifically for Swedish motorcycle dealerships — not a generic CRM with motorcycle fields bolted on.
features.f1d: Visual kanban board, lead scoring, overdue alerts. Track every prospect from first contact to signed deal.
features.f2d: Verify customer identity in seconds. Auto-fills name, address and personnummer — zero manual entry.
features.f3d: Legally compliant agreements in one click. Digital signing, VAT calculations, Konsumentköplagen warranties.
features.f4d: Klarna, Svea, Swish, Trustly, card. Customers pay how they want — invoices created automatically.
features.f5d: Revenue trends, pipeline value, margin per deal, top sellers. Know exactly where your business stands.
features.f6d: SMS and email alerts for new leads, signed agreements, payments. Never miss a hot prospect.
features.f7d: Full CRM with purchase history, vehicle ownership, GDPR exports and NPS scores.
features.f8d: New bikes, trade-ins, stock levels, reorder triggers. Every motorcycle tracked end to end.

how.title: Hello to signed deal in 4 steps
how.sub: From the moment a customer walks in to the moment they ride away — streamlined at every step.
how.s1d: Open a new lead in seconds. Scan BankID for instant identity verification — name and address filled automatically.
how.s2d: Move through stages: contacted → test ride → negotiating → payment. Lead scores show where to focus.
how.s3d: One click generates a pre-filled, legally compliant purchase agreement. Customer signs digitally with BankID.
how.s4d: Klarna, Swish, card or financing. Invoice auto-created, revenue hits analytics instantly.
how.bankidDesc: Sweden's most trusted identity solution is native to BikeMeNow — verify customers, sign agreements and switch staff accounts. Included on all plans. No extra cost.

testimonials.title: Real results, real dealers
testimonials.q1: We closed 40% more deals in our first month. BankID verification alone saves 20 minutes per customer.
testimonials.q2: The pipeline view changed how our whole team works. Nothing gets forgotten, every lead is visible.
testimonials.q3: A compliant purchase agreement used to take 30 minutes. Now it takes 30 seconds — and it's more accurate.

pricing.title: Pick your plan. Start free.
pricing.sub: 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required. Cancel any time.
pricing.basicDesc: Perfect for small dealerships just getting started.
pricing.standardDesc: The most popular choice for growing dealerships.
pricing.proDesc: For large dealerships with multiple locations.
pricing.vatNote: All prices ex. VAT · Prices may vary by dealership size · Contact us for custom enterprise pricing

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: Do I need a long-term contract?
faq.a1: No. BikeMeNow is month-to-month. Cancel any time with 30 days' notice. Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation.
faq.q2: How does the 14-day free trial work?
faq.a2: You get full access to all features for 14 days — no credit card required. At the end of the trial, choose a plan that fits your dealership.
faq.q3: Is BankID included on all plans?
faq.a3: Yes. BankID verification for customers and staff is included on every plan — Basic, Standard and Professional.
faq.a4: We support Klarna (financing & BNPL), Svea (financing), Swish (instant transfer), Trustly (bank transfer), Nets/DIBS (card), and Adyen. Enable only the ones you need.
faq.a5: Yes. Customer data is stored in Swedish/EU data centres. Built-in GDPR data export and deletion tools on every customer profile.
faq.a6: Multi-location support is included in the Professional plan. Each branch gets its own pipeline, inventory and staff permissions.

cta.sub: Join Sweden's fastest-growing motorcycle dealerships. Start your free 14-day trial today — no credit card, no commitment.

showcase.c2desc: Visual kanban board with automated lead scoring, overdue alerts and BankID-verified prospects. Close 40% more deals without extra headcount.
showcase.c3desc: Manage leads, review agreements and track payments from your phone, tablet or desktop. BikeMeNow follows you everywhere.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How {dealerName} handles your personal data
privacy.s1body: {dealerName}, org.nr {orgNr}, {city}. Contact for data protection queries: {email}
privacy.s2body: BankID: name, personal identity number, signature timestamp, OCSP verification. Roaring.io / SPAR (Swedish Population Register): registered address, gender, date of birth, protected identity flag. Manual: email address, telephone number. Purchase history: contracts, invoices, vehicles (make, model, VIN, registration number).
privacy.s3body: Performance of contract (6.1b): processing needed to fulfil a purchase agreement. Legal obligation (6.1c): bookkeeping (Bokföringslagen 7 years), anti-money-laundering checks. Legitimate interests (6.1f): customer relationship management, credit assessment. Consent (6.1a): marketing communications — withdrawable at any time.
privacy.s4title: How long do we keep your data?
privacy.s4body: Transaction data (contracts, invoices): 7 years (Bokföringslagen). Customer profile: for the duration of the customer relationship + 3 years. BankID logs: 5 years. Leads without purchase: 1 year.
privacy.s5title: Who do we share data with?
privacy.s5body: BankID AB (Bankgirot) — identity verification. Roaring Technologies AB — SPAR population register lookups. Payment service providers: Svea, Klarna, Swish, Nets and others depending on chosen payment method. Fortnox AB — accounting integration. Transportstyrelsen (Swedish Transport Agency) — vehicle ownership registration.
privacy.s6body: You have the right to: access your data, rectify inaccurate data, erasure (subject to Bokföringslagen 7-year retention), restrict processing, data portability (export in machine-readable format), object to processing based on legitimate interest. Submit requests to: {email}
privacy.s7body: BankID risk classification (Low/Medium/High) is used as an advisory indicator only. It is not legally binding and can be challenged by contacting us.
privacy.s8body: We use only strictly necessary cookies: a session cookie for authentication and a locale cookie for language preference. No tracking or marketing cookies are used.
privacy.s9body: If you have concerns about how we handle your data, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swedish Data Protection Authority (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten, IMY), Box 8114, 104 20 Stockholm, www.imy.se.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: BikeMeNow — Dealership Platform by {dealerName}
terms.s1body: BikeMeNow is a SaaS platform for motorcycle dealerships registered in Sweden with a valid F-tax certificate (F-skattebevis). The service includes CRM, lead management, purchase agreements, and payment integrations.
terms.s2body: Use requires a registered organisation number, a valid F-tax certificate, and at least one administrator identified via BankID. By subscribing you confirm compliance with these requirements.
terms.s3body: The subscriber is responsible for all activity under their account credentials. BankID authentication is required for administrative actions. Notify us immediately of any unauthorised access.
terms.s4body: All prices include 25% VAT. A 14-day free trial is available with no payment required. Billing is monthly or annually. Cancellation must be submitted at least 30 days before the next billing period. No refunds for a period already started.
terms.s5body: The software and design belong to {dealerName}. Customer data is owned by the subscriber and can be exported upon termination.
terms.s6body: {dealerName} is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profit, or system failures. Maximum liability is limited to 3 months' subscription fee.
terms.s7body: This agreement is governed by Swedish law. Disputes are in the first instance referred to the Swedish National Board for Consumer Disputes (ARN, www.arn.se). Failing resolution, disputes are settled by Stockholm District Court.
